g.text: C1 22uF - bulk at the MT3608 input (VLOAD, right at boost VIN, after the U7 shunt)

g.desc: C1 22uF - bulk at the MT3608 input (VLOAD, right at boost VIN, after the U7 shunt)

g.text: C2 100uF - bulk on the 5V rail, at the DevKit 5V pin

g.desc: C2 100uF - bulk on the 5V rail, at the DevKit 5V pin

g.text: C3 10uF - beside C2 at the DevKit 5V pin

g.desc: C3 10uF - beside C2 at the DevKit 5V pin

g.text: D1 (1N5817): MT3608 5V -> DevKit 5V pin; isolates the boost so USB VBUS wins when flashing (no back-feed).

g.desc: D1 (1N5817): MT3608 5V -> DevKit 5V pin; isolates the boost so USB VBUS wins when flashing (no back-feed).

g.text: C4 10uF - bulk on the 3V3 rail, at the DevKit 3V3 pin

g.desc: C4 10uF - bulk on the 3V3 rail, at the DevKit 3V3 pin

g.text: C5 100nF - across BMP388 VCC-GND, hard against the chip's pins

g.desc: C5 100nF - across BMP388 VCC-GND, hard against the chip's pins

g.text: C6 100nF - across MLX90614 VCC-GND, hard against the chip's pins

g.desc: C6 100nF - across MLX90614 VCC-GND, hard against the chip's pins

g.text: Rule: a 100nF sits right at each chip; bulk caps go where current steps (boost out, radio, regulator).

g.desc: Rule: a 100nF sits right at each chip; bulk caps go where current steps (boost out, radio, regulator).

g.text: PV-12W -> [U6 INA219] -> CN3791 12V MPPT -> 1S LiPo -> [U7 INA219] -> MT3608 (5.0V) -> DevKit 5V pin.

g.desc: PV-12W -> [U6 INA219] -> CN3791 12V MPPT -> 1S LiPo -> [U7 INA219] -> MT3608 (5.0V) -> DevKit 5V pin.

g.text: U6 INA219 0x40: high-side on the PV feed = harvest current + panel voltage.

g.desc: U6 INA219 0x40: high-side on the PV feed = harvest current + panel voltage.

g.text: U7 INA219 0x41: high-side on the battery->boost feed = load current + battery voltage (Vbus).

g.desc: U7 INA219 0x41: high-side on the battery->boost feed = load current + battery voltage (Vbus).

g.text: Both INA219 on I2C0 (VCC=3V3, 0.1ohm onboard shunt). GPIO2/ADC1_CH1 now a free spare; battery V comes from U7.

g.desc: Both INA219 on I2C0 (VCC=3V3, 0.1ohm onboard shunt). GPIO2/ADC1_CH1 now a free spare; battery V comes from U7.
